description: 10 MCP server quality upgrades: dryRun, is_ready, structured errors, output schemas, pagination, CRMLite

features.name: dryRun flag on Instagram MCP write tools: instagram_send_dm, instagram_post_comment, instagram_accept_message_request
dryRun flag on Twitter MCP write tools: twitter_send_dm, twitter_post_reply, twitter_post_tweet
dryRun flag on TikTok MCP write tools: tiktok_send_dm, tiktok_post_comment
is_ready tools on all 4 MCP servers: instagram_is_ready (checks :3100/:3005), twitter_is_ready (:3003/:3007), tiktok_is_ready (:3102/:3006), linkedin_is_ready
Structured error objects on Instagram MCP: { code: RATE_LIMITED|SESSION_EXPIRED|NOT_FOUND, retryAfter?, action?, platform }
Structured error objects on Twitter, TikTok, and LinkedIn MCPs matching same error code schema as Instagram
outputSchema on Instagram get_conversations and get_messages tools with typed conversation/message shapes
outputSchema on Twitter, TikTok, LinkedIn get_conversations and get_messages tools
Pagination cursors on all get_conversations tools: response shape { items, nextCursor, total } with optional cursor input
crm_get_contact tool on all 4 MCP servers: calls CRMLite /api/contacts/by-username/{platform}/{username}, returns contact history
